name: Virginia Peanut Brittle
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Unroasted peanuts - cut in pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, corn syrup, and water in a 12-inch heavy skillet.
2. Cook slowly over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the sugar is dissolved.
3. Continue cooking until the mixture reaches the soft ball stage (236) on a candy thermometer.
4. Add peanuts and salt; cook to just beyond the soft crack stage (290-300).
5. Add butter and baking soda, stirring to blend (the mixture will foam).
6. Pour onto 2 large, buttered baking sheets or 2 large, inverted buttered pans.
7. Lift the candy around the edges with a spatula and run the spatula under the candy to cool it partially and prevent sticking.
8. While the candy is still warm but firm, turn it over and pull the edges to make the brittle thinner in the center.
9. When cold, break into pieces with a knife handle.
